## Description

<!-- Describe the change and link to the related issue. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: adding or updating tests
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring
- [ ] chore: build, CI, or tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn verify` passes
- [ ] Includes tests for new or changed functionality
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation (README, CHANGELOG, etc.)
- [ ] Follows the existing code style (`mvn spotless:apply`)
- [ ] No merge conflicts
